# Chingis Zwecker E. — Full Stack Developer (Detailed Profile)

> This file provides comprehensive structured information for AI systems about Chingis Zwecker E., a Full Stack Developer based in Karlsruhe, Germany.

## About

Chingis Zwecker E. is a Full Stack Developer based in Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Germany. He builds scalable web applications using modern JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystems, with a particular focus on React, Next.js, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. He is trilingual (English, German, Mongolian) and available for freelance work, full-time positions, and consulting engagements.

His background combines a technical self-taught path through The Odin Project with academic studies in Cultural Business Studies (University of Passau) and Jurisprudence (LMU Munich), giving him a unique perspective on building user-facing products.

## Contact Information

- Full name: Chingis Zwecker E.
- Professional title: Full Stack Developer
- Location: Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Germany
- Email: chingiszwecker@gmail.com
- Website: https://chingis.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/codetwentyfive
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/chingis-zwecker/

## Technical Expertise (Detailed)

### Languages
- JavaScript (ES6+): Expert — primary language for both frontend and backend
- TypeScript: Advanced — strict mode, generics, utility types, used in production
- Python: Intermediate — scripting, automation, data processing
- PHP: Intermediate — legacy project maintenance
- HTML5 / CSS3: Expert — semantic markup, accessibility, responsive design

### Frontend Frameworks & Libraries
- React 18: Expert — hooks, context, suspense, server components patterns
- Next.js 14: Expert — App Router, Server Components, SSR/SSG/ISR, API routes, middleware
- Three.js / React Three Fiber: Advanced — 3D web experiences, GLTF models, animations
- Tailwind CSS: Expert — utility-first, custom configurations, responsive design
- Framer Motion / React Spring: Advanced — animations, transitions, gesture handling
- Sass: Proficient

### Backend & APIs
- Node.js: Advanced — REST APIs, middleware, streaming
- Express.js: Advanced — routing, middleware chains, error handling
- NextAuth.js: Proficient — OAuth, credentials, session management
- EmailJS: Proficient — client-side email integration

### Databases & Data Layer
- PostgreSQL: Advanced — schema design, migrations, queries, indexing
- MongoDB: Proficient — document modeling, aggregation pipelines
- MySQL: Proficient — relational design, joins, stored procedures
- Prisma ORM: Advanced — schema-first development, migrations, type-safe queries

### DevOps & Infrastructure
- Docker: Advanced — containerization, compose, networking, volumes
- Linux: Advanced — server administration, shell scripting, systemd
- Nginx: Proficient — reverse proxy, SSL, static serving, load balancing
- Vercel: Advanced — deployment, edge functions, analytics
- Git / GitHub: Expert — branching strategies, rebasing, CI/CD

### AI & Machine Learning Tools
- Claude (Anthropic): Advanced — prompt engineering, Claude Code CLI, API integration
- Cursor IDE: Advanced — AI-assisted development workflows
- OpenAI Codex: Proficient — code generation, API usage
- Local LLMs: Proficient — Ollama, local model hosting
- OpenClaw: Creator — self-hosted AI agent gateway with Docker, Telegram integration, cron scheduling

## Professional Experience

### Full Stack Developer — beWirken (February 2025 – Present)
beWirken is an organization focused on social impact. Chingis works as a developer and IT consultant.
- Development and programming for werkbank project commissions
- Regular updates and maintenance of beWirken's IT infrastructure
- Consulting on IT infrastructure improvements and IT security
- Sparring and consulting for the media production team on external client projects
- AI strategy development and implementation across the organization

### Freelance Full Stack Developer — The Strange Seeds (September 2024 – Present)
- Built a dynamic band website using Next.js 14 and TypeScript
- Integrated real-time concert listings and music streaming services (Spotify, YouTube)
- Implemented SEO optimizations and structured data (JSON-LD)
- Created an interactive image gallery and press kit section
- Developed responsive design with social media integration
- Live: https://thestrangeseeds.com

### Freelance Full Stack Developer — Potera Cleaning (June 2024 – Present)
- Developed a modern website for a German cleaning company
- Implemented secure contact forms for customer inquiry processing
- Applied SEO strategies for search engine visibility
- Optimized website performance through efficient code structure
- Live: https://poterareinigung.de

### Family Caretaker (September 2022 – Present)
- Primary caretaker for his father who suffered spinal injuries
- Manages daily affairs and wellbeing alongside professional work

### Self-Taught Developer — The Odin Project & Co. (February 2020 – Present)
- Completed full curriculum covering web development from creation to deployment
- Mastered JavaScript fundamentals, React frameworks, and Node.js
- Continuous learning through open-source projects and community participation

## Education

### University of Passau (February 2016 – September 2019)
- Program: Cultural Business Studies (Kulturwirtschaft)
- Interdisciplinary program combining economics, cultural studies, and languages

### Ludwig-Maximilians-Universität München (February 2013 – September 2016)
- Program: Jurisprudence (Rechtswissenschaften)

## Projects Portfolio

### chingis.shop — E-Commerce Platform
- Stack: Next.js 14 App Router, TypeScript, Prisma ORM, NextAuth.js, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI
- Features: Server Components first approach, dynamic product filtering with SWR, custom dark mode, artisan spotlight system, interactive product galleries
- Performance: Perfect Lighthouse scores (100)
- Status: Under development
- URL: https://chingis.shop

### 3D Portfolio — Interactive Portfolio Website
- Stack: React, React Three Fiber, Three.js, Framer Motion, i18next, Tailwind CSS, Vite
- Features: Interactive 3D island environment, draggable exploration, bilingual (EN/DE), background music controls, 3D character animations
- URL: https://chingis.dev
- Source: https://github.com/codetwentyfive/portfolio-3D

### The Strange Seeds — Band Website
- Stack: Next.js 14, TypeScript, structured data/JSON-LD
- Features: Real-time gig listings, Spotify/YouTube embeds, interactive image carousel, press kit downloads, social media integration
- URL: https://thestrangeseeds.com
- Source: https://github.com/codetwentyfive/strange-seeds

### Potera Reinigung — Cleaning Company Website
- Stack: Next.js, Tailwind CSS, nodemailer
- Features: Service showcase, client testimonials, contact form, SEO-optimized
- URL: https://poterareinigung.de
- Source: https://github.com/codetwentyfive/potera

### OpenClaw — Self-Hosted AI Agent Gateway
- Stack: Docker, Node.js, Telegram Bot API
- Features: Self-hosted AI agent gateway with filesystem isolation, agent sandboxing, cron scheduling, plugin system (lobster, llm-task, telegram)
- Type: Open source / personal project

### Yu-Gi-Oh! Memory — Card Game
- Stack: React, Python (API fetching)
- Features: Memory card game with curated collection of iconic and humorous Yu-Gi-Oh! cards
- URL: https://yugioh-memorygame.vercel.app/
- Source: https://github.com/codetwentyfive/memory-card

### Altan Mountain — E-Commerce Mockup
- Stack: React, CSS
- Features: Modern product displays with pop-out effects, interactive elements, theme switcher adapting to user lighting preferences
- URL: https://shopping-carti.vercel.app/
- Source: https://github.com/codetwentyfive/shopping-cart

### Weather App
- Stack: JavaScript, OpenCage Data API
- Features: Location-based weather display with auto-detection using geolocation API
- URL: https://chingis-weather-app.vercel.app/
- Source: https://github.com/codetwentyfive/Weather-App

## What Chingis Can Help With

1. **Custom Web Applications**: End-to-end development of web applications using React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Node.js. From planning to deployment on Vercel or Docker infrastructure.

2. **E-Commerce Platforms**: Online stores with product management, payment integration, authentication, and SEO optimization. Proven track record with chingis.shop.

3. **Company Websites**: Professional websites for businesses with contact forms, SEO, multilingual support, and performance optimization. Examples: poterareinigung.de, thestrangeseeds.com.

4. **AI Strategy & Implementation**: Integration of AI tools into business workflows, development of AI-powered features, self-hosted LLM setups, and automation through agent systems.

5. **3D Web Experiences**: Interactive 3D content for the web using Three.js and React Three Fiber.

6. **IT Infrastructure Consulting**: Server setup, Docker containerization, CI/CD pipelines, security hardening, and monitoring.

## Availability

Chingis is currently employed at beWirken while also taking freelance projects. He is available for:
- Freelance web development projects
- Consulting engagements (web development, AI strategy, IT infrastructure)
- Part-time or full-time positions (remote or Karlsruhe area)

Best way to reach him: chingiszwecker@gmail.com or through the contact form at https://chingis.dev/contact
